hooks.command: jq -r '"\(.tool_name) \(.tool_input.command // empty)"' | skillgate gateway check --stdin --capability shell.exec 2>/dev/null; exit 0
jq -r '"\(.tool_name) \(.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty)"' | skillgate gateway check --stdin --capability fs.write 2>/dev/null; exit 0
jq -r '"\(.tool_name) \(.tool_input.url // empty)"' | skillgate gateway check --stdin --capability net.outbound 2>/dev/null; exit 0
jq -r '"Task \(.tool_input.description // empty)"' | skillgate gateway check --stdin --capability shell.exec --subagent 2>/dev/null; exit 0
jq -r '.tool_response.output // empty' | skillgate gateway scan-output --stdin 2>/dev/null; exit 0
